panels.title: User Operations (excl. exporter)
panels.description: Rate of user-initiated LDAP operations (add, modify, delete, compare, modrdn). Excludes search/bind operations generated by the exporter.

True inter-node propagation lag per server_id: seconds each node is behind the most-advanced node's contextCSN for that RID. The most up-to-date node reads 0; a value rising on one node means it is falling behind its peers. Requires every node to be scraped (one series per `server`). Unlike now-minus-CSN, an idle master does not show as lag here.

targets.expr: max by (base_dn, server_id) (openldap_replication_csn_timestamp) - on (base_dn, server_id) group_right () openldap_replication_csn_timestamp

panels.title: Replication Propagation Lag

panels.description: CSN timestamp for each replication context. Only available when replication is configured.
panels.title: Replication CSN Timestamp

panels.description: Replication topology read from cn=config: Active-Active when any database has olcMultiProvider/olcMirrorMode TRUE, otherwise Active-Passive. Shows 'No data' when the bind identity cannot read the config tree.
panels.title: Replication Mode

panels.description: Number of OpenLDAP nodes currently scraped (distinct `server` label). The 'Peers' stat shows the highest configured olcSyncrepl provider count seen on any node (from cn=config).
panels.title: Nodes / Configured Peers

panels.description: Reachability of each replication peer polled directly from this node (OPENLDAP_REPLICATION_POLL_ENABLED). 1 = connected and bound, 0 = unreachable.
panels.title: Replication Peer Reachability

panels.description: Per-peer propagation lag computed centrally from this node: reference CSN (max of local and all peers for that server_id) minus the peer's CSN. The most up-to-date source reads 0. Requires OPENLDAP_REPLICATION_POLL_ENABLED.
panels.title: Replication Peer Propagation Lag

panels.description: Per-user password policy status: failure and lock events observed in the dashboard time range (via accesslog), password change time, and last successful bind.
panels.title: User Password Policy Status

panels.description: Password failure events per user derived from the accesslog. Each point is the rate of failed binds (result != success) over the interval. Useful for detecting brute-force attempts.
panels.title: Password Failures Over Time

panels.description: Account lock events per user over time, derived from accesslog auditModify entries that set pwdAccountLockedTime.
panels.title: Account Lock Events

panels.description: Bind operations per user from the accesslog database. Event counts over the selected dashboard time range.
panels.title: Bind Operations per User

panels.description: Bind success events per user over time, rate computed from the accesslog.
panels.title: Bind Successes Over Time

panels.description: Bind failure events per user over time, rate computed from the accesslog. Useful for detecting brute-force attempts.
panels.title: Bind Failures Over Time

panels.description: Write operations (add, modify, delete, modrdn) per user from the accesslog.
panels.title: Write Operations per User
Nearest TLS Cert Expiry
panels.description: Days until the soonest-expiring certificate in the server's live TLS chain. Red < 14d, yellow < 30d.

panels.title: TLS Certificate Expiry
panels.description: Each certificate the server presents on the live TLS handshake. usage=server is the leaf, usage=ca the issuing chain.
